title: helenium luteum
intro: Helenium luteum, also known as the American or yellow sneezeweed, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbalism, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as colds and flu, as well as skin conditions, like eczema and acne, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Helenium luteum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application, making it a versatile remedy in natural medicine.
